name: egxresearch-public-site
description: Payload-first static GitHub Pages site for the EGXResearch public EGX /Alpha signal.

scripts.test: node tests/test-public-wire.mjs && npm run build && node tests/test-build-output.mjs && npm run verify:pages && node tests/test-no-leakage.mjs && node tests/test-no-binaries.mjs
